projectsList.title: Smart Lock System
projectsList.description: IoT-based secure access control system using ESP32 microcontroller
points: Designed and developed a smart lock system integrating ESP32 with sensors and IoT for secure access control
Implemented real-time sensor data processing for authentication and automated locking mechanisms
Built hardware-software integration pipeline using Python for backend logic and ESP32 for embedded control

projectsList.title: Online Streaming Platform
projectsList.description: Python-based streaming application with mood-driven features
points: Built a streaming platform inspired by Python with mood control and emoji depiction capabilities
Implemented content recommendation logic based on user mood selection and interaction patterns
Designed intuitive user interface for seamless media streaming and mood-based filtering

projectsList.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projectsList.description: Responsive portfolio website built with HTML and CSS
points: Designed and developed a personal portfolio website using HTML for structure and CSS for layout and styling
Implemented responsive design principles ensuring cross-device compatibility
Created clean typography and visual hierarchy for professional presentation
